name: Witchling Thrall

abilities.name: Demise (Flashover)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, models within (r)1" gain a Burning token.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (c) abilities of other models.

actions.name: Massive Fists
actions.effects: This action deals +2 damage for each raise instead of +1.

triggers.name: Smolder
triggers.text: If the target has a Burning token, it resolves the Burning token. Then, it gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Cleansing Flame
triggers.text: Make an Inferno marker in base contact with the target and remove up to one token from the target.

triggers.name: Drain Magic
triggers.text: Target discards a card. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

actions.name: Scorching Blaze
actions.effects: All enemies within (aura)3" of the target must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or move 3" toward the target.

extraction_notes: STN: 12 visible on card - this appears to be a stat or attribute not in the standard schema
